title: Mods in a Jar
body:
Cookies so delicious, they should be forbidden.
Adds mod cookies, that can be crafted by adding 8 cookies around a mud block. When put in a dispenser and dispensed, it will apply a random effect, based on a Mod ID drawn out of the Mod ID pool.

Also adds a cookie jar to store those mods, eh, i mean cookies. (hence the name)

![Created for ModFest: Singularity](https://blob.jortage.com/blobs/5/d4d/5d4d14d96db2e2024d87cf5606cb7ce6421633a002e328947f85d210ba250ecb9f86de8df210dd031be2d4eafb0980494e7a1e8e99590a550abaa42d82768b9f)
